basics.name: Ayush Yadav
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Computer Science graduate from Miami University (B.S. in Computer Science, May 2026; 3.47 overall GPA) with experience building Python and SQL data pipelines, full-stack products, applied ML workflows, and reliability-focused tooling.

work.name: Miami University
work.summary: Built Python/SQL pipelines for 1M+ row datasets; analyzed trends and KPIs. Delivered Tableau dashboards with actionable insights for IT/non-IT teams. Built Workday/OAS/Tableau report inventory + API-integrated Slack bot.
highlights: Built Python/SQL pipelines for 1M+ row datasets; analyzed trends and KPIs
Delivered Tableau dashboards with actionable insights for IT/non-IT teams
Built Workday/OAS/Tableau report inventory + API-integrated Slack bot

work.name: Market Street at MacCracken
work.summary: Supported checkout and grill operations; maintained accurate service and safety standards.
highlights: Supported checkout and grill operations; maintained accurate service and safety standards

projects.name: AutoML – Automated Data Scientist Platform
projects.description: RAG + MCP platform for domain-tuned ML services (deploy + monitor). Automated training: HPO/multi-model search + SFT; containerized runs. TS monorepo: React (Vite), Express, Postgres, Playwright evals.
highlights: RAG + MCP platform for domain-tuned ML services (deploy + monitor)
Automated training: HPO/multi-model search + SFT; containerized runs
TS monorepo: React (Vite), Express, Postgres, Playwright evals

projects.name: Visual Assist – iOS LiDAR Visual Assistance App
projects.description: On-device iOS LiDAR navigation with depth scan + audio/haptics. Vision OCR + object awareness; VoiceOver + voice commands.
highlights: On-device iOS LiDAR navigation with depth scan + audio/haptics
Vision OCR + object awareness; VoiceOver + voice commands
Wearable planned; current version targets iOS LiDAR devices

projects.name: TaskFlow Calendar
projects.description: Production-ready full-stack calendar & task management platform with NLP-powered smart input, multi-calendar support, and real-time conflict detection. 738 passing tests.
highlights: NLP-powered smart input and real-time conflict detection

projects.name: LifeQuest – Quest-Based Routine & Community Platform
projects.description: Desktop quest platform turning routines into missions for job loss/retirement. Tauri + React + NestJS (Postgres/Prisma) for quests, progress, rewards.
highlights: Desktop quest platform turning routines into missions
Tauri + React + NestJS (Postgres/Prisma) for quests, progress, rewards
Future iOS app will add map-based quest experience

projects.name: Fast MNIST NN – High-Performance C++ Neural Network
projects.description: C++17 MNIST NN with SIMD kernels + OpenMP hot paths. CLI train/eval pipeline; cached MNIST loader for repeat runs. Catch2/CTest, Google Benchmark, CI.
highlights: C++17 MNIST NN with SIMD kernels + OpenMP hot paths
CLI train/eval pipeline; cached MNIST loader for repeat runs
Catch2/CTest, Google Benchmark, CI, Doxygen, clang-format

awards.title: Finalist – MUCAT Design Innovation Competition
awards.summary: Selected as finalist team; authored LiDAR visual assistance proposal (foundation for Visual Assist)

awards.title: 4th Place – Social Innovation Weekend
awards.summary: Built user-centered solutions to loneliness/isolation; placed 4th among interdisciplinary teams

volunteer.summary: Taught basic education to underserved children, promoting literacy and inclusion.
